title: ctenopteris oreophila
intro: Ctenopteris oreophila, also known as the Mountain Fern or Ctenopteris fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris oreophila are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris oreophila include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are typically made by drying the plant's fronds and leaves.
